title: Havetia martii

Havetia martii is a part of the genus Havetia, which is classified under the order Sapindales. The classification of Havetia martii is further detailed as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots. It is a member of the clade Rosids within the clade core eudicots.
